description_long: This is a compact, boxy SUV with a dark blue exterior and a utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. The body features two side doors, blacked-out windows, and a short, flat hood with subtle contour lines. The front grille is wide and horizontal, flanked by rectangular headlights and a simple bumper. The rear includes a large window with a single wiper and a protruding license plate holder, while the wheels are robust with multi-spoke steel rims. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, practical vehicle suitable for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A compact, boxy dark blue SUV with blacked-out windows, two side doors, and robust multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and flat hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door layout, blacked-out windows, and wheel design.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large rear window with a wiper, license plate holder, and taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the two-door configuration and wheel details.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-hole steel rim with circular vent holes and a simple, utilitarian finish
